description_long: This is a black flat-brimmed cap with a structured, boxy crown and a prominent green patch on the front. The patch displays the words 'SUPER HAT' in bold, black capital letters, making it a statement piece. The cap appears to be made primarily of fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a stiffened brim for shape retention. The crown is deep and rounded, providing full coverage for the head, and the back features an open section, possibly for size adjustment. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for casual streetwear. The hat's minimalistic color palette is contrasted by the bright green patch, which serves as its main decorative element.
description: A black flat-brimmed cap with a green 'SUPER HAT' patch on the front, featuring a structured crown and open back. The design is bold and urban, ideal for streetwear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open back of the cap, with no visible decorations or text.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat brim and the edge of the green patch with partial text visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full green 'SUPER HAT' patch and the structured crown.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flat brim and the side of the green patch with partial text.
